scripts.dev: bun run dev:api & bun run dev:admin
scripts.ci:sdk: bun run test:sdk && bun run typecheck:sdk && bun run ci:sdk-dist-clean
scripts.release:sdk:patch: bun run test:sdk && npm --prefix packages/sdk version patch && npm --prefix packages/sdk run build && npm publish ./packages/sdk --access public
scripts.release:sdk:minor: bun run test:sdk && npm --prefix packages/sdk version minor && npm --prefix packages/sdk run build && npm publish ./packages/sdk --access public
scripts.release:sdk:major: bun run test:sdk && npm --prefix packages/sdk version major && npm --prefix packages/sdk run build && npm publish ./packages/sdk --access public
